title: Advisor-Strategy Configuration
description: Schema for the .loa.config.yaml::advisor_strategy section. Cycle-108 sprint-1 T1.A; extended in cycle-110 sprint-2a T2.1 with dispatch_preference + headless-concurrency fields. Closes PRD §5 FR-1, SDD §3.1-§3.2, and NFR-Sec1 hard-pin via const-pinning of review/audit role tiers.

schema_version.description: Schema version. cycle-108 ships v1; cycle-110 sprint-2a bumps to v2 (additive: dispatch_preference + per-role overrides + auto_mode + headless_concurrency). v1 configs continue to load (additive evolution per cycle-110 SDD §3.6).

enabled.description: Master switch. Default false (opt-in). When false, all consumers behave identically to pre-cycle-108 (advisor-everywhere).

tier_resolution.description: Tier-alias resolution mode. static pins to .loa.config.yaml commit SHA at load time (Sprint 3 benchmark REQUIRED mode). dynamic re-resolves per invocation. SDD §3.6.

defaults.description: Role-to-tier defaults. NFR-Sec1: review and audit are const-pinned to advisor.

review.description: NFR-Sec1 hard-pin: review role MUST resolve to advisor tier. Schema-level enforcement (SDD §3.2, ATK-A1 closure).

audit.description: NFR-Sec1 hard-pin: audit role MUST resolve to advisor tier.

tier_aliases.description: Tier → per-provider model-id mapping. Within-provider only per OOS-4.

per_skill_overrides.description: Optional per-skill tier overrides. Loader §3.3 step 4 rejects review/audit skill overrides to non-advisor tier with exit 78. Skill names MUST exist in the skill registry (runtime check).

audited_review_skills.description: Schema-pinned allowlist of skills permitted to use review tier (cycle-108 ATK-A1 closure SDD §3.7). Adding a new review skill requires a schema-version bump approved by operator via CODEOWNERS.

max_cost_usd.description: Pre-run cost cap (USD). Harness aborts if estimate exceeds. NFR-P3 / IMP-011.

historical_medians_path.description: Path to historical-medians.json (CODEOWNERS-protected, computed by tools/modelinv-rollup.sh). ATK-A6 closure.

dispatch_preference.description: Cycle-110 FR-1.1: cycle-wide dispatch preference. 'headless' prefers CLI-based subscription dispatch; 'http_api' prefers HTTP API dispatch; 'auto' uses windowed success-rate band comparison with cold-start fallback to recommended_for per FR-3.3. Per-role overrides via per_role_dispatch_preference.

allow_cross_auth_fallback.description: Cycle-110 FR-1.2: when set, controls whether resolver may fall back across auth_types when the preferred bucket's chain is exhausted. NULL derives from dispatch_preference per the FR-1.4 default ladder: headless→false (operator opted into headless explicitly; do NOT silently fall back to paid HTTP); http_api→true (legacy behavior — fall back to headless if available); auto→true (auto-mode already considers all buckets). C16 carry-in: this ladder is the canonical default and MUST be documented in operator-facing docs.

per_role_dispatch_preference.description: Cycle-110 FR-1.3: per-role override of dispatch_preference. Useful when planning needs reasoning (gpt-5.5-pro headless route may not exist) while review/audit prefer headless. Each value MUST be one of the dispatch_preference enum values.

auto_mode.description: Cycle-110 FR-3.3: deterministic 'auto' resolution-mode parameters. Operators rarely tune these; defaults match SDD §5.2 spec.

headless_margin_bps.description: C15 carry-in: headless preferred-margin in basis-points. When auto-mode compares per-(provider, auth_type) success rates, headless wins ties + ties-within-margin. 200 bps = 2pp. Set to 0 to disable preference (strict equality required for headless to win).

headless_concurrency_scope.description: C7 carry-in / SDD §5.6: scope of the N-slot semaphore guarding headless CLI dispatch. cross_process (default) coordinates via slot-lock files; process_only is in-process threading.Semaphore only. Operators may downgrade to process_only AFTER FR-8.6 stress test confirms session-safety at the per-CLI N limit.

headless_concurrency_limit.description: C7 carry-in / FR-8.6: per-CLI concurrency cap (N-slot semaphore). Default 50 (per-CLI safe values are discovered at sprint-2 T2.16 stress test and may seed model-config.yaml::headless_concurrency_limit per provider/model).
